user.title: Marstek Venus E Setup
user.description: Start the setup process to find and connect to your Marstek Venus E device.

discovery.title: Discovering Devices
discovery.description: Scanning your local network for Marstek devices...

select_device.title: Select Device
select_device.description: Found {device_count} device(s). Select a device, retry discovery, or enter an IP address manually.

manual_ip.title: Enter Device IP Address
manual_ip.description: No devices were discovered automatically. Please enter the IP address of your Marstek Venus E device manually.

clear_schedules.title: Manage schedules with Home Assistant
clear_schedules.description: Optionally let Home Assistant manage the manual charge and discharge schedules. Enable this only if all ten schedules currently stored on the device should be disabled.

data.clear_schedules: Manage schedules with Home Assistant – delete all schedules stored on the device

data_description.clear_schedules: Disables all ten existing manual schedule slots. Leave unchecked to keep the schedules unchanged.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to device. Check IP address and port.
error.no_device_selected: Please select a device or enter an IP address.

abort.cannot_retrieve_schedules: Unable to retrieve current schedules from device.

init.title: Marstek Venus E Configuration
init.description: Configure your Marstek Venus E device settings

configure_manual_mode.title: Configure Manual Mode Schedule
configure_manual_mode.description: Set up charging/discharging schedules for Manual mode. {power_info}

data_description.time_slot: Select which time slot to configure (you can create up to 10 different schedules)
data_description.start_time: When this schedule should start each day
data_description.end_time: When this schedule should end each day
data_description.days: Select which days of the week this schedule is active
data_description.power: Battery power: negative values charge (e.g., -1000W), positive values discharge (e.g., 1000W)

configure_update_interval.title: Configure Update Interval
configure_update_interval.description: Configure separate polling intervals for live power values and operating-mode/CT data.

configure_operating_modes.title: Select available operating modes
configure_operating_modes.description: Choose the modes shown by the operating-mode entity. Storage mode keeps the battery around 50%: charge at 500 W from 45%, hold at 50%, and use Auto from 55% until it returns to 50%.

data_description.enabled_modes: Select at least one operating mode.

configure_solar_surplus.title: Configure solar surplus
configure_solar_surplus.description: Select the Home Assistant power sensor used by automatic storage and configure time-weighted surplus thresholds.

error.select_at_least_one_mode: Select at least one operating mode.
error.solar_on_must_exceed_off: The turn-on threshold must be higher than the turn-off threshold.

set_mode.name: Set Operating Mode
set_mode.description: Change the operating mode of the Marstek Venus E system

set_passive_mode.name: Set Passive Mode
set_passive_mode.description: Set passive mode with a specific power target

change_operating_mode.name: Change Operating Mode
change_operating_mode.description: Change the operating mode with optional manual schedule configuration (when Manual mode is selected)
